pi_items.source: Task description and verified motor slip formula: Slip = (Ns - Nr) / Ns × 100 with Ns=1800, Nr=1725 yields 4.1667%
Task description specifies rotor speed of 1725 RPM; verified in motor slip calculation
Verified by calculating slip percentage: (1800-1725)/1800 × 100 = 4.1667%. Minimum of 4.10 is conservative but acceptable as it brackets the exact calculated value of 4.1667%
Verified by calculating slip percentage: (1800-1725)/1800 × 100 = 4.1667%. Maximum of 4.25 properly contains the exact calculated value
Confirmed in task.json description (line 5), setup_task.sh (line 12), and verifier.py (line 39) which references the result file location

privileged_info_summary: This task uses synthetic data to test motor slip calculation skills. The synchronous speed is 1800 RPM and measured rotor speed is 1725 RPM, which yields an exact slip percentage of 4.1667% using the standard formula (Ns-Nr)/Ns × 100. The metadata expected range [4.10, 4.25] correctly encompasses this calculated value. The task requires interaction with the com.hsn.electricalcalculations Android app (a verified real application on Google Play) to calculate slip and write results to /sdcard/tasks/motor_slip_result.txt.
